app.name: OETools
app.subtitle: Or Eliav Tools
app.tagline: Privacy-first local iOS & iPadOS device management

timeline.title: Backup Timeline
timeline.subtitle: A local, Time Machine-style history of your device backups.
timeline.label: Label
timeline.noSnapshotsHint: Create a backup to start building a snapshot timeline for this device.
timeline.cleanupBody: The following unprotected snapshots exceed your retention policy and can be removed. Protected snapshots are never deleted.
timeline.nothingToClean: Nothing to clean up — all snapshots fit within your retention policy.

retention.title: Retention Policy
retention.subtitle: Rules that decide which snapshots to keep and which to clean up.

scheduled.title: Scheduled Backups
scheduled.subtitle: Automate local backups per device. The app suggests due backups while it is open.
scheduled.noSchedulesHint: Add a schedule to automate backups for this device.
scheduled.dueBody: These schedules are due. Run them while the device is connected.

privacy.title: Privacy Center
privacy.subtitle: Everything OETools stores stays on this computer. Review and remove local data any time.
privacy.deleteAllBody: This permanently removes every local device record, backup index, report, log, export and scan from this app. Backup files on disk are not touched. This cannot be undone.
privacy.telemetryNote: OETools contains no telemetry in this version. Any future optional analytics would be strictly opt-in and explained here.

backupBrowser.title: Backup Browser
backupBrowser.description: Browse and export safe, user-accessible data from local backups — app files, contacts, photo metadata and more.

quickTransfer.title: Quick Transfer
quickTransfer.description: Drag and drop music, photos, books, PDFs and documents to send them to compatible destinations on your device.

fileBrowser.title: File Browser
fileBrowser.description: Browse file-sharing containers and documents for apps that support it, over USB.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Export SMS, MMS and iMessage conversations from a local backup, with printable HTML, CSV, JSON and TXT output.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: Export contacts from your device or a local backup as vCard, CSV or JSON.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Export notes from a local backup. Rich parsing is planned for a future release.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: A future adapter for exporting WhatsApp data from backups where technically and legally supported.

exportAll.title: Export All Data
exportAll.description: Run a full, multi-category export into a single organized package.

evidenceExport.title: Evidence Export
evidenceExport.description: Generate structured, verifiable export packages with hashes, a manifest and chain-of-custody metadata.

exportHistory.title: Export History
exportHistory.description: Review, re-open and manage your previous exports.

securityAnalyzer.title: Security Analyzer
securityAnalyzer.description: Analyze a local backup for potential security indicators. Local-only, and never a forensic guarantee.

profiles.title: Configuration Profiles
profiles.description: View, install and remove Apple configuration profiles on your device, with a safety review before install.

profileEditor.title: Profile Editor
profileEditor.description: Create simple Apple configuration profiles (Wi-Fi, Web Clip and more) and export them as .mobileconfig.

supervision.title: Supervision
supervision.description: Understand and manage supervised-device workflows for business devices. Education-first and experimental.

fleet.title: Fleet
fleet.description: Manage multiple devices locally — groups, inventory, blueprints and batch actions for IT teams.

comingSoon.localNote: All processing is local by default — nothing is uploaded.
comingSoon.backendNote: The data model and backend integration points for this module are already in place; the full experience is landing in an upcoming release.

safety.owned: This operation only works on devices you own or are authorized to manage.
safety.localDefault: All processing is local by default.
safety.noBypass: This tool does not bypass Apple security protections.
safety.encryptedPassword: Encrypted backups require the backup password. We cannot recover forgotten backup passwords.
safety.securityIndicators: Security analysis identifies potential indicators only and is not a forensic certification.
safety.supervisionWarning: Supervision and profile operations may affect device behavior. Review carefully before applying.

onboarding.welcomeBody: A clean, local-first utility to manage your iPhone and iPad over USB. Your data stays on this computer.
onboarding.privacyBody: OETools works fully offline. It never uploads your device data, contains no telemetry, and only uses safe, legitimate device-management methods. It does not bypass any Apple security protection.
onboarding.privacyBullet1: All backups, reports and logs are stored locally.
onboarding.privacyBullet2: No cloud, no tracking, no hidden extraction.
onboarding.privacyBullet3: You are always asked before any destructive action.
onboarding.folderBody: Pick where backups, exports and reports will be stored on this computer.
onboarding.dependenciesBody: OETools uses open-source tools (libimobiledevice) to talk to your device. Missing tools only limit real-device features — Mock Mode always works.
onboarding.trustBody: When you connect your device, unlock it and tap “Trust” on the “Trust This Computer?” prompt. You may need to enter your passcode.
onboarding.connectBody: Plug your device into a USB port. If you don't have one handy, enable Mock Mode to explore the app with a simulated device.

devices.title: Devices
devices.noDeviceBody: Connect an iPhone or iPad via USB, or enable Mock Mode to explore the app.
devices.notTrustedBody: Unlock your device and tap “Trust” to continue. Then pair it below.
devices.multipleHint: Multiple devices are supported; choose one to manage.

deviceInfo.title: Device Information
deviceInfo.safeNote: Only safe, non-sensitive fields are shown. Secrets and protected data are never accessed.
deviceInfo.batteryHistoryHint: OETools records a snapshot each time you view this device (about once an hour). The trend will appear here.

backups.title: Backups
backups.createBody: A full local backup will be saved to your backup folder. This can take several minutes and requires the device to stay connected and unlocked.
backups.encryptedHint: Encrypted backups also include health, Wi-Fi and other sensitive data. Keep your password safe — it cannot be recovered.
backups.restoreDisabled: Restore is experimental and disabled in this version for safety.
backups.warning: Do not disconnect the device during backup.

media.title: Media
media.emptyHint: Media browsing may be unavailable on this device, or the required tools are missing.
media.duplicatesPlaceholder: Duplicate detection coming in a future version.
media.importPlaceholder: Media import coming in a future version.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.noLogs: No log lines yet. Start the log stream to view live output.

reports.title: Reports
reports.notesPlaceholder: Optional notes to include in the report…

settings.title: Settings
settings.mockModeHint: Simulate connected devices for testing without hardware.
settings.localOnlyHint: Guarantees no network access. Always on in this version.
settings.telemetryHint: Disabled by default. OETools collects no analytics.
settings.realNotReady: Install required tools for real devices

backupBrowser.noSourcesHint: Create a backup here, or use “Choose folder…” to point at a Finder/iTunes backup.
backupBrowser.encryptedBody: This backup is encrypted. Reading its contents requires the backup password, which isn't supported yet.
backupBrowser.emptyTitle: No exportable content found in this backup

messages.selectConversation: Select a conversation to view messages

converter.title: Media Converter
converter.description: Convert images, audio and video locally, and create custom ringtones. Uses sips/ffmpeg — nothing is uploaded.
converter.convertBody: Add files and pick an output format. HEIC → JPEG and common audio/video conversions are supported.
converter.toolsNote: Images use macOS sips; audio/video use ffmpeg (install with: brew install ffmpeg).
converter.ringtoneBody: Trim any audio or video file into a custom .m4r ringtone.

authenticity.title: Authenticity & Health
authenticity.disclaimer: This is a local health & consistency summary based on data reported by the device. It is not a definitive proof of genuineness and never contacts Apple or any network.

securityAnalyzer.disclaimer: A local triage aid that inspects an unencrypted backup for common risk signals. It is not a forensic guarantee and never contacts any network.
